title: I Have Followed Truth and Justice

verses.text: I am yours, O give me wisdom, make me know your truth, I pray; sinner have despised your statutes; now, O LORD, your pow’r display. LORD, I love your good commandments and esteem them more than gold; all your precepts are most righteous; hating sin, to these I hold.
